planted.title: Discount percent not clamped: percent > 1 yields a negative price
Per-order coupon subtracted on every line item (multi-line over-discount)
Tax computed on the pre-discount subtotal (wrong tax base)
Refund returns float money from division instead of rounded integer cents
Proration hardcodes /30 and ignores the days_in_month argument
Tier boundary off-by-one: quantity at a tier's max falls into the next tier
pct truncates the fractional cent instead of rounding half-up
stack applies the second discount to the original subtotal, not the already-discounted amount
allocate drops the remainder when splitting an order discount (integer division)
Loyalty threshold uses > instead of >= (spend exactly at a threshold misqualified)
to_dollars uses integer // 100 and truncates the cents part
average_line divides by len with no guard for empty input (ZeroDivisionError)

bonus_items.title: average_line integer floor division loses fractional cents
bonus_items.evidence: average_line() uses integer floor division (//), so the average can be off by up to len(lines) - 1 cents

bonus_items.title: allocate ZeroDivisionError when line_count == 0
bonus_items.evidence: `allocate()` divides by `line_count` with no check; `line_count == 0` raises `ZeroDivisionError`

bonus_items.title: refund missing validation for days_used >= days_total
bonus_items.evidence: When days_used >= days_total, the function returns 0 or a negative refund ... with no validation

bonus_items.title: allocate ZeroDivisionError when line_count=0
bonus_items.evidence: allocate() raises ZeroDivisionError when line_count is 0

bonus_items.title: refund ZeroDivisionError when days_total=0
bonus_items.evidence: refund_amount() raises ZeroDivisionError when days_total is 0

bonus_items.title: refund negative when days_used > days_total
bonus_items.evidence: unused is negative and the function returns a negative refund

bonus_items.title: refund_amount ZeroDivisionError when days_total=0
bonus_items.evidence: divides by days_total with no guard; days_total=0 raises ZeroDivisionError

bonus_items.title: allocate ZeroDivisionError when line_count=0
bonus_items.evidence: allocate() performs order_discount // line_count with no guard; line_count=0 raises ZeroDivisionError
